Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class LoopContractImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.LoopContractImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AuxiliaryContract, LoopContract, SpecificationElement
public final class LoopContractImpl extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl implements LoopContract
Default implementation for LoopContract.
See Also:
  • LoopContractImpl.Creator

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    LoopContractImpl.Combinator
    This class is used to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
    static class 
    LoopContractImpl.Creator
    This class is used to build LoopContractImpls.

    Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.SpecificationElement

    getKJT, getVisibility

  • Constructor Details

    • LoopContractImpl

      public LoopContractImpl(String baseName, StatementBlock block, List<Label> labels, IProgramMethod method, Modality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Map<LocationVariable,Term> preconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePreconditions, Term measuredBy, Map<LocationVariable,Term> postconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> modifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, boolean transactionApplicable, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasFreeModifiable, Term decreases, ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> functionalContracts, Services services)
      Construct a loop contract for a block that starts with a loop.
      Parameters:
      baseName - the base name.
      block - the block this contract belongs to.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      method - the method containing the block.
      modalityKind - this contract's modality.
      preconditions - this contract's preconditions on every heap.
      measuredBy - this contract's measured-by term.
      postconditions - this contract's postconditions on every heap.
      modifiableClauses - this contract's modifiable clauses on every heap.
      freeModifiableClauses - this contract's free modifiable clauses on every heap.
      infFlowSpecs - this contract's information flow specifications.
      variables - this contract's variables.
      transactionApplicable - whether or not this contract is applicable for transactions.
      hasModifiable - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a modifiable clause.
      hasFreeModifiable - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a free modifiable clause.
      decreases - the contract's decreases clause.
      functionalContracts - the functional contracts corresponding to this contract.
      services - services.

    • LoopContractImpl

      public LoopContractImpl(String baseName, LoopStatement loop, List<Label> labels, IProgramMethod method, Modality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Map<LocationVariable,Term> preconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePreconditions, Term measuredBy, Map<LocationVariable,Term> postconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> modifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, boolean transactionApplicable, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasFreeModifiable, Term decreases, ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> functionalContracts, Services services)
      Construct a loop contract for a loop.
      Parameters:
      baseName - the base name.
      loop - the loop this contract belongs to.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      method - the method containing the block.
      modalityKind - this contract's modality.
      preconditions - this contract's preconditions on every heap.
      measuredBy - this contract's measured-by term.
      postconditions - this contract's postconditions on every heap.
      modifiableClauses - this contract's modifiable clauses on every heap.
      freeModifiableClauses - this contract's free modifiable clauses on every heap.
      infFlowSpecs - this contract's information flow specifications.
      variables - this contract's variables.
      transactionApplicable - whether or not this contract is applicable for transactions.
      hasModifiable - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a modifiable clause.
      hasFreeModifiable - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a free modifiable clause.
      decreases - the contract's decreases clause.
      functionalContracts - the functional contracts corresponding to this contract.
      services - services.

  • Method Details

    • combine

      public static LoopContract combine(ImmutableSet<LoopContract> contracts, Services services)
      Parameters:
      contracts - a set of loop contracts to combine.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the combination of the specified loop contracts.

    • getHead

      public StatementBlock getHead()
      Description copied from interface: LoopContract

      This contains any statements that are executed before the loop.

      It is only used if the loop is a for loop, in which case it contains the loop initializers

      Specified by:
      getHead in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      statements to execute before the loop.

    • getGuard

      public Expression getGuard()
      Specified by:
      getGuard in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      the loop guard.

    • getBody

      public StatementBlock getBody()
      Specified by:
      getBody in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      the loop body.

    • getTail

      public StatementBlock getTail()
      Specified by:
      getTail in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      all statements after the loop.

    • getLoop

      public LoopStatement getLoop()
      Specified by:
      getLoop in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      a loop of the form while(<getGuard()>) { <getBody()> }

    • getIndexVariable

      public ProgramVariable getIndexVariable()
      Specified by:
      getIndexVariable in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      the index variable if LoopContract.getLoop() is an enhanced for-loop, null otherwise.
      See Also:
      • EnhancedForElimination.getIndexVariable()

    • getValuesVariable

      public ProgramVariable getValuesVariable()
      Specified by:
      getValuesVariable in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      the values variable if LoopContract.getLoop() is an enhanced for-loop, null otherwise.
      See Also:
      • EnhancedForElimination.getValuesVariable()

    • isOnBlock

      public boolean isOnBlock()
      Specified by:
      isOnBlock in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      true if this contract belongs to a block, false if it belongs to a loop.

    • toBlockContract

      public BlockContract toBlockContract()
      Description copied from interface: LoopContract
      Returns a BlockContract for AuxiliaryContract.getBlock(). This is used to apply for-loop and for-each-loops: The block containing the loop is applied using a block contract; inside that block contract's validity branch, the while-loop obtained by transforming the for-loop is applied using a loop contract.
      Specified by:
      toBlockContract in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      a valid BlockContract for AuxiliaryContract.getBlock().

    • setFunctionalContract

      public void setFunctionalContract(FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?> contract)
      Specified by:
      setFunctionalContract in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Overrides:
      setFunctionalContract in class AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
      Parameters:
      contract - the new functional contract.
      See Also:
      • AuxiliaryContract.getFunctionalContracts()

    • isInternalOnly

      public boolean isInternalOnly()
      Specified by:
      isInternalOnly in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      true iff this contract should only be applied using LoopContractInternalRule.

    • getLoopLabels

      public List<Label> getLoopLabels()
      Specified by:
      getLoopLabels in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      all labels that belong to the loop, or an empty list if the loop is not a labeled statement.

    • getDecreases

      public Term getDecreases()
      Specified by:
      getDecreases in interface LoopContract
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause.

    • getDecreases

      public Term getDecreases(Term heap, Term self, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getDecreases in interface LoopContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause on the specified heap.

      services - services.
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause.

      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.

    • update

      public LoopContract update(StatementBlock newBlock, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newModifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newinfFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, Term newMeasuredBy, Term newDecreases)
      Specified by:
      update in interface LoopContract
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      newPreconditions - the new preconditions.
      newPostconditions - the new postconditions.
      newModifiableClauses - the new modifiable clauses.
      newFreeModifiableClauses - the new free modifiable clauses.
      newinfFlowSpecs - the new information flow specifications.
      newVariables - the new variables.
      newMeasuredBy - the new measured-by clause.
      newDecreases - the new decreases clause.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract with the specified attributes.

    • update

      public LoopContract update(LoopStatement newLoop, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newModifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newinfFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, Term newMeasuredBy, Term newDecreases)

    • replaceEnhancedForVariables

      public LoopContract replaceEnhancedForVariables(StatementBlock newBlock, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: LoopContract
      Replaces \index and \values with the proper variables in all terms of this contract.
      Specified by:
      replaceEnhancedForVariables in interface LoopContract
      Parameters:
      newBlock - a new block.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to the new block, and \index and \values are replaced by proper variables in all terms.

      public LoopContract setBlock(StatementBlock newBlock)
      Specified by:
      setBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Specified by:
      setBlock in interface LoopContract
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different block.

      Parameters:
